---
title: "Publications"
nocite: |
  @*
---

The list below reflects my [April 2025 CV](assets/cv_hazlett_april2025.pdf)
plus more recent working papers visible on
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pbD0dGwAAAAJ).
Entries marked *Working paper* are in progress, under review, or recently
posted.

If something looks wrong or out of date, please
[let me know](mailto:chazlett@stat.ucla.edu) — the list rebuilds
automatically from [`references.bib`](https://github.com/chadhazlett/chadhazlett.github.io/blob/main/references.bib).

---

::: {#refs}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Group the #refs bibliography by year (descending) and insert year headings.
// Runs client-side after Quarto's citeproc has populated #refs.
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const refs = document.getElementById('refs');
  if (!refs) return;

  const entries = Array.from(refs.querySelectorAll('.csl-entry'));
  if (entries.length === 0) return;

  const groups = new Map();
  for (const entry of entries) {
    const text = entry.textContent;
    const m = text.match(/\((\d{4})\)/) || text.match(/\b(19\d{2}|20\d{2})\b/);
    const year = m ? m[1] : 'Undated';
    if (!groups.has(year)) groups.set(year, []);
    groups.get(year).push(entry);
  }

  const years = Array.from(groups.keys()).sort(function (a, b) {
    if (a === 'Undated') return 1;
    if (b === 'Undated') return -1;
    return parseInt(b, 10) - parseInt(a, 10);
  });

  // Preserve the refs container; swap in year-grouped content
  while (refs.firstChild) refs.removeChild(refs.firstChild);
  for (const year of years) {
    const h2 = document.createElement('h2');
    h2.className = 'pub-year-heading';
    h2.textContent = year;
    refs.appendChild(h2);

    const section = document.createElement('div');
    section.className = 'references csl-bib-body hanging-indent pub-year-section';
    for (const entry of groups.get(year)) section.appendChild(entry);
    refs.appendChild(section);
  }
});
</script>
```
